⚙️ Settings

Configure Agentic OS, API keys, and integrations

🔑 API Keys

Keys are stored encrypted in your local vault. Never leave your machine.

Get a free key at openrouter.ai/keys — unlocks Claude, GPT-4o, Gemini, Grok, Llama, and more.

🏠 Local LLM (Ollama)

Run LLMs 100% locally. No API costs. Private.

Checking…
Setup Guide:
1. Download: ollama.com
2. Install a model: ollama pull llama3.1:8b
3. Ollama runs automatically on localhost:11434
4. In agent settings, set provider to Ollama and model to llama3.1:8b

🤖 Agents

Manage your AI agent team. Create, edit, or delete agents.

🎨 Appearance

Choose your interface complexity and visual preferences.

You can also switch anytime from the sidebar or your profile panel (top-right).
